scripts.setup: pnpm -C frontend install && npm --prefix backend install && npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:deploy
scripts.check: npm run check:build && npm run smoke:local
scripts.dev: concurrently -n frontend,backend -c cyan,green "pnpm -C frontend dev" "npm --prefix backend run dev"
scripts.build: npm run sync:version && pnpm -C frontend build && npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.release:web-desktop: npm run sync:version && pnpm dlx vercel deploy frontend --prod -y && npm run release:desktop
scripts.check:build: npm run sync:version && pnpm -C frontend build && npm --prefix backend run build
